content:
1. Generates a monthly Report of ArticleSummaries (with word totals) from DB articles in [year,month], optionally filtered by category. Exists to produce aggregated publication stats.

2. DB schema/keys + author lookups; month=12 boundary; post-init mutation of Report counters; datetime.now() tz-naïve.

3. Unknown — would need to ask the author.

4. Bad year/month; missing DB rows/keys; author fetch failure; empty input; negative/None word_count.
